title: eval_if/eval_elsif_else mutual recursion: stack overflow with many elsif
description: eval_if and eval_elsif_else are mutually recursive with no depth limit. Each elsif clause adds two stack frames. A Sieve script with N elsif clauses in a single if-chain (which the parser accepts without limit since only block nesting is depth-guarded) can blow the evaluator stack. Adversarial input: 'if true { } elsif true { } ... x 5000 ...'. Fix: replace the mutual recursion with an iterative loop over the remaining forms slice.
